title: Thai Salmon Braise
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired salmon dish, braised in a rich and savory sauce.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, then set aside.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fish sauce, brown sugar, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the bay leaves and the seared salmon fillets to the pot.
Braise the salmon for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
